results.question: The DICT National PKI (PNPKI) issues digital certificates that serve as:
results.user_answer_text: B. Government-grade identity verification for electronic signatures
results.correct_answer_text: B. Government-grade identity verification for electronic signatures

results.question: Under the Labor Code of the Philippines, regular employees may only be dismissed for:
results.user_answer_text: B. Just causes or authorized causes, with due process
results.correct_answer_text: B. Just causes or authorized causes, with due process

results.question: A jurat in a notarial act requires the affiant to:
results.user_answer_text: B. Sign in the presence of the notary and swear/affirm the truth of the contents
results.correct_answer_text: B. Sign in the presence of the notary and swear/affirm the truth of the contents

results.question: Under the Anti-Money Laundering Act (RA 9160, as amended), covered persons must report suspicious transactions to:
results.user_answer_text: B. The Anti-Money Laundering Council (AMLC)
results.correct_answer_text: B. The Anti-Money Laundering Council (AMLC)

results.question: An ENP who performs notarial acts outside their authorized territorial jurisdiction may face:
results.user_answer_text: B. Suspension or revocation of their notarial commission
results.correct_answer_text: B. Suspension or revocation of their notarial commission

results.question: What is the maximum validity period of a notarial commission in the Philippines?
results.user_answer_text: B. Two (2) years
results.correct_answer_text: B. Two (2) years

results.question: Under Philippine law, a Special Power of Attorney (SPA) grants the attorney-in-fact authority to perform:
results.user_answer_text: B. Only acts specifically enumerated in the SPA
results.correct_answer_text: B. Only acts specifically enumerated in the SPA

results.question: BSP Circular No. 944 specifically governs:
results.user_answer_text: B. Electronic Know-Your-Customer (eKYC) standards for financial institutions
results.correct_answer_text: B. Electronic Know-Your-Customer (eKYC) standards for financial institutions

results.question: Under A.M. No. 24-10-14-SC, the electronic notarial register (e-register) must be maintained for a minimum of:
results.user_answer_text: B. Five (5) years
results.correct_answer_text: C. Ten (10) years

results.question: Under the Civil Code of the Philippines, which element is NOT required for a valid contract?
results.user_answer_text: B. Object certain which is the subject matter
results.correct_answer_text: D. Notarization of the document

results.question: Under RA 10173, the right of a data subject to request deletion of their personal data is known as the:
results.user_answer_text: B. Right to erasure or blocking
results.correct_answer_text: B. Right to erasure or blocking

results.question: Under A.M. No. 24-10-14-SC, which of the following is a ground for REVOCATION of an ENP's commission?
results.user_answer_text: B. Gross misconduct, conviction of a crime involving moral turpitude, or violation of the Rules on ENP
results.correct_answer_text: B. Gross misconduct, conviction of a crime involving moral turpitude, or violation of the Rules on ENP

results.question: When an ENP's notarial commission EXPIRES, they must:
results.user_answer_text: B. Immediately cease performing notarial acts and surrender or secure their notarial records pending renewal or transfer
results.correct_answer_text: B. Immediately cease performing notarial acts and surrender or secure their notarial records pending renewal or transfer

results.question: Under A.M. No. 24-10-14-SC, conflict of interest rules prohibit an ENP from notarizing a document when:
results.user_answer_text: B. The ENP is a party to the instrument, a relative within the fourth civil degree of the principal, or has a direct financial interest in the transaction
results.correct_answer_text: B. The ENP is a party to the instrument, a relative within the fourth civil degree of the principal, or has a direct financial interest in the transaction

results.question: Under the 2004 Rules on Notarial Practice, which of the following constitutes COMPETENT EVIDENCE OF IDENTITY?
results.user_answer_text: B. At least one current government-issued ID with photograph and signature of the individual
results.correct_answer_text: B. At least one current government-issued ID with photograph and signature of the individual

results.question: Under A.M. No. 24-10-14-SC, the ENP's electronic notarial register (e-register) must include:
results.user_answer_text: B. Entry number, date and time, type of notarial act, name and ID of principal, description of document, and fee charged
results.correct_answer_text: B. Entry number, date and time, type of notarial act, name and ID of principal, description of document, and fee charged

results.question: The primary difference between a Jurat and an Acknowledgment is:
results.user_answer_text: B. In a Jurat, the affiant swears to the truth of the document's contents; in an Acknowledgment, the principal confirms it is their free and voluntary act
results.correct_answer_text: B. In a Jurat, the affiant swears to the truth of the document's contents; in an Acknowledgment, the principal confirms it is their free and voluntary act

results.question: What is the minimum document retention period for electronic notarial certificates under A.M. No. 24-10-14-SC?
results.user_answer_text: B. Ten (10) years
results.correct_answer_text: B. Ten (10) years

results.question: An acknowledgment in a notarial act means the principal declares before the notary that:
results.user_answer_text: B. The instrument is his/her free and voluntary act and deed
results.correct_answer_text: B. The instrument is his/her free and voluntary act and deed

results.question: Under RA 8792 (Electronic Commerce Act), an electronic signature is legally binding when:
results.user_answer_text: B. It is distinctively linked to the signatory, capable of identifying them, created under their sole control, and any alteration to the document is detectable
results.correct_answer_text: B. It is distinctively linked to the signatory, capable of identifying them, created under their sole control, and any alteration to the document is detectable

results.question: Under A.M. No. 24-10-14-SC, liveness verification during Remote Electronic Notarization (REN) is required to:
results.user_answer_text: B. Confirm that the person appearing is physically present and alive, preventing impersonation and spoofing attacks
results.correct_answer_text: B. Confirm that the person appearing is physically present and alive, preventing impersonation and spoofing attacks

results.question: Under A.M. No. 24-10-14-SC, an ENP must verify the identity of a remote principal using:
results.user_answer_text: B. Government-issued ID and liveness verification through audiovisual technology
results.correct_answer_text: B. Government-issued ID and liveness verification through audiovisual technology

results.question: SEC Memorandum Circular No. 28-2020 primarily authorizes:
results.user_answer_text: B. Remote notarization for SEC filings
results.correct_answer_text: B. Remote notarization for SEC filings

results.question: Under A.M. No. 24-10-14-SC, what is the primary difference between In-Person Electronic Notarization (IEN) and Remote Electronic Notarization (REN)?
results.user_answer_text: B. IEN requires the principal to be physically present; REN allows the principal to appear via audiovisual communication technology
results.correct_answer_text: B. IEN requires the principal to be physically present; REN allows the principal to appear via audiovisual communication technology

results.question: An Electronic Notary Public (ENP) may perform Remote Electronic Notarization (REN) for a principal located abroad ONLY IF:
results.user_answer_text: B. The principal is a Filipino citizen and the document is for use in the Philippines, subject to applicable rules
results.correct_answer_text: B. The principal is a Filipino citizen and the document is for use in the Philippines, subject to applicable rules

results.question: The National Privacy Commission (NPC) requires organizations to designate a:
results.user_answer_text: B. Data Protection Officer (DPO)
results.correct_answer_text: B. Data Protection Officer (DPO)

results.question: A Deed of Absolute Sale must be notarized primarily because:
results.user_answer_text: B. It converts the document from a private to a public instrument, giving it evidentiary weight
results.correct_answer_text: B. It converts the document from a private to a public instrument, giving it evidentiary weight

results.question: Under A.M. No. 24-10-14-SC, cross-border notarization by a Philippine ENP is permitted when:
results.user_answer_text: B. The principal is a Filipino citizen or foreign national executing a document for use in the Philippines, subject to applicable Philippine rules
results.correct_answer_text: B. The principal is a Filipino citizen or foreign national executing a document for use in the Philippines, subject to applicable Philippine rules

results.question: Under A.M. No. 24-10-14-SC, which of the following is a MANDATORY requirement for all REN sessions?
results.user_answer_text: B. Both the ENP and principal must be recorded via audiovisual communication technology
results.correct_answer_text: B. Both the ENP and principal must be recorded via audiovisual communication technology

results.question: The penalty for performing notarial acts WITHOUT a valid notarial commission in the Philippines is:
results.user_answer_text: B. Criminal liability for falsification of public documents, in addition to administrative sanctions including disbarment proceedings
results.correct_answer_text: B. Criminal liability for falsification of public documents, in addition to administrative sanctions including disbarment proceedings

results.question: Under the Anti-Money Laundering Act (RA 9160, as amended by RA 10365), notaries public are classified as:
results.user_answer_text: B. Covered persons required to perform customer due diligence and report suspicious transactions to the AMLC
results.correct_answer_text: B. Covered persons required to perform customer due diligence and report suspicious transactions to the AMLC

results.question: For a Memorandum of Agreement (MOA) to be legally enforceable in the Philippines, it must have:
results.user_answer_text: B. Consent, object, and cause — the essential requisites of a valid contract
results.correct_answer_text: B. Consent, object, and cause — the essential requisites of a valid contract

results.question: The blockchain audit trail in Quanby Legal ensures document integrity through:
results.user_answer_text: B. Cryptographic hashing and immutable distributed ledger entries
results.correct_answer_text: B. Cryptographic hashing and immutable distributed ledger entries

results.question: Under A.M. No. 24-10-14-SC, which document CANNOT be e-notarized?
results.user_answer_text: B. A Last Will and Testament
results.correct_answer_text: B. A Last Will and Testament

results.question: An e-notarized Deed of Sale for real property in the Philippines must still be submitted to which agency for transfer of title?
results.user_answer_text: B. Bureau of Internal Revenue (BIR) for tax clearance, then Register of Deeds
results.correct_answer_text: B. Bureau of Internal Revenue (BIR) for tax clearance, then Register of Deeds

results.question: Under RA 10173 (Data Privacy Act), personal data collected during e-notarization must be:
results.user_answer_text: B. Retained indefinitely for audit purposes
results.correct_answer_text: C. Processed lawfully, fairly, and for specified, explicit, and legitimate purposes

results.question: Under BSP Circular 944, which of the following is an acceptable method for eKYC identity verification?
results.user_answer_text: B. Facial recognition with liveness detection matched against a government-issued ID
results.correct_answer_text: B. Facial recognition with liveness detection matched against a government-issued ID

results.question: The Supreme Court accreditation requirement for ENP platforms primarily ensures that the platform:
results.user_answer_text: B. Meets technical, security, and procedural standards set by the Court to protect the integrity of notarial acts
results.correct_answer_text: B. Meets technical, security, and procedural standards set by the Court to protect the integrity of notarial acts

results.question: Which of the following is a PROHIBITED ACT under the Notarial Practice Rules?
results.user_answer_text: B. Notarizing an instrument where the signatory is not personally present (in-person) or properly connected via AVT (remote), or whose identity has not been verified
results.correct_answer_text: B. Notarizing an instrument where the signatory is not personally present (in-person) or properly connected via AVT (remote), or whose identity has not been verified

results.question: Under RA 8792, an electronic document has the same legal effect as a paper document UNLESS:
results.user_answer_text: B. The law specifically requires a document to be in writing and excludes electronic form
results.correct_answer_text: B. The law specifically requires a document to be in writing and excludes electronic form

results.question: Under RA 8792, which type of transaction is EXCLUDED from being conducted entirely through electronic means?
results.user_answer_text: B. Execution of negotiable instruments such as checks, promissory notes, and bills of exchange requiring physical delivery
results.correct_answer_text: B. Execution of negotiable instruments such as checks, promissory notes, and bills of exchange requiring physical delivery

results.question: Under RA 10173 (Data Privacy Act), what is the required action when a personal data breach occurs that likely harms data subjects?
results.user_answer_text: B. Notify the National Privacy Commission (NPC) within 72 hours of discovery and inform affected data subjects
results.correct_answer_text: B. Notify the National Privacy Commission (NPC) within 72 hours of discovery and inform affected data subjects

results.question: In a contract of lease under Philippine law, the lessee's right to the property is BEST described as:
results.user_answer_text: B. A personal right enforceable only against the lessor
results.correct_answer_text: B. A personal right enforceable only against the lessor

results.question: Which court or body accredits Electronic Notarization Facilities (ENFs) in the Philippines?
results.user_answer_text: B. Integrated Bar of the Philippines (IBP)
results.correct_answer_text: C. Supreme Court of the Philippines

results.question: An electronic notarial certificate under A.M. No. 24-10-14-SC must contain:
results.user_answer_text: B. The ENP's name, commission number, commission expiry date, jurisdiction, type of notarial act, and a statement that the required verification was performed
results.correct_answer_text: B. The ENP's name, commission number, commission expiry date, jurisdiction, type of notarial act, and a statement that the required verification was performed

results.question: In Philippine corporate law under RA 11232 (Revised Corporation Code), the minimum number of incorporators required to form a stock corporation is:
results.user_answer_text: B. Three (3)
results.correct_answer_text: C. One (1)

results.question: Under RA 10173 and A.M. No. 24-10-14-SC, personal data collected during an e-notarization session may be retained by the ENP or platform for:
results.user_answer_text: B. Only as long as necessary for the purpose of the notarization, and in compliance with the minimum retention period required by law (ten years for the e-register), after which it must be securely disposed of
results.correct_answer_text: B. Only as long as necessary for the purpose of the notarization, and in compliance with the minimum retention period required by law (ten years for the e-register), after which it must be securely disposed of

results.question: Under the 2004 Rules on Notarial Practice, a notary public is PROHIBITED from notarizing a document if:
results.user_answer_text: B. The notary is a party to the instrument or has a financial interest in the transaction
results.correct_answer_text: B. The notary is a party to the instrument or has a financial interest in the transaction

results.question: Which Republic Act governs the legal validity of electronic signatures in the Philippines?
results.user_answer_text: B. RA 10173 — Data Privacy Act
results.correct_answer_text: C. RA 8792 — Electronic Commerce Act

results.question: Under the 2004 Rules on Notarial Practice (as extended by A.M. No. 24-10-14-SC), a notary public must ensure the principal is NOT:
results.user_answer_text: B. Acting freely and voluntarily
results.correct_answer_text: C. Under duress, influence, or incapacity
